title: Daman, Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Daman is a city in Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu with a population of 200,000. A coastal union territory on the Arabian Sea, known for its Portuguese colonial heritage, beaches, and as a popular weekend getaway.
